name: liquidflow
description: LiquidFlow - A professional trading platform for Hyperliquid exchange with real-time market data, AI assistant, and portfolio management

scripts.install-all: npm run install-frontend && npm run install-backend && npm run install-python
scripts.dev-python: concurrently "cd Python && uvicorn bot:app --reload --port 8001" "cd Python && uvicorn signing_api:app --reload --port 8002"
scripts.test: npm run test-frontend && npm run test-backend

author: LiquidFlow Team
